note: API token prices in USD per 1,000,000 tokens. These are ASSUMPTIONS (representative public list prices, mid-2025); update before final submission. Cited in reports/ECONOMICS.md.

prompt_caching.note: Fraction of the input price paid for a cached (repeated system-prompt) token; e.g. 0.5 = 50% off. Providers vary (OpenAI ~0.5, Anthropic cache-read ~0.1).
